chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1700 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 23.10.2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Channa advocate a/w petitioners Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G Sindh a/w SIP Dileejan Rind *** Mr. Tarique Ali Narai advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.9 to 11, which is taken on record. Investigation Officer has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1, wherein she has specifically stated that she being sui juris contracted free will marriage with petitioner No.2 and no one has abducted her. Investigation Officer submits that based on the statement of petitioner No.1 he will file his report before the learned Magistrate concerned for disposal of the case under C-class. Learned counsel for the petitioners is satisfied and seeks disposal of the petition accordingly. In view of the above instant petition is disposed of with directions to Investigation Officer to submit his report before the learned Magistrate concerned within a week’s time for disposal of the case in accordance with law. In the meanwhile the official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
